slides.title: Withdrawals breach SLA, silently
bullets: Revoke acknowledgement p50 is 9.4s against a 5s default
74% of sampled revokes breach — and no one sees it
Lifecycle state drifts Hub vs LFI for up to 14 minutes
slides.note: Today the only trigger is a customer complaint.

slides.title: Consent operations is flying blind
bullets: Analyst is accountable for honouring withdrawals in time
Care agents act on stale 'active' state
Compliance cannot prove SLA adherence on demand

slides.title: Governance says: observe, don't extend
bullets: Residual risk Low — conditional on read-only observability
PII redaction, INSERT-only audit, P6 egress carried to delivery

slides.title: A hygiene monitor — made tangible
bullets: Timeliness vs the 5s default, in real time
